summary: Verified fix for 'login bounces back to /login' bug. Root cause was cookies missing Secure flag on HTTPS/Cloudflare. After defaulting COOKIE_SECURE=true, full login → dashboard flow works end-to-end.

issues: Benign Recharts warning: width(-1)/height(-1) — non-blocking, already noted in iter 3

critical_code_review_comments: auth.py L13: COOKIE_SECURE defaults to true (correct for HTTPS prod). L14: COOKIE_SAMESITE configurable. Good.
curl verified: Set-Cookie for access_token & refresh_token both include 'HttpOnly; SameSite=lax; Secure'.
Minor: on logout the app redirects to /login rather than /. Review request mentioned '/'; functionally equivalent since / is unauthenticated marketing page. Not blocking.
test_credentials: admin@aqi.io / admin123 (seeded). Fresh register test_1783532013@ex.com / password123.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fix verified via UI (Playwright) + curl + backend log inspection. Tests done: (1) admin login → lands on /dashboard, stays there; (2) both access_token and refresh_token cookies are httpOnly=true & secure=true; (3) backend log shows only 200s for /api/datasets and /api/history post-login (no 401s); (4) sidebar nav across datasets/train/predict/reports/admin/dashboard — user stays authed; (5) F5 refresh on /dashboard — session persists; (6) fresh register auto-login → /dashboard with welcome toast; (7) logout clears cookies (access_token gone), redirects to /login.
rca of the issue: Cloudflare terminates TLS in front of the origin, so responses go over HTTPS to the browser. Chrome/Edge enforce that cookies with SameSite=Lax over HTTPS should also be Secure; without the Secure flag, some browser + proxy combos silently drop the cookie on subsequent same-site requests, causing 401 on the very first /api/datasets call after login → axios interceptor then redirects to /login. Fix: default COOKIE_SECURE to 'true' in /app/backend/auth.py so Set-Cookie now emits 'Secure' — cookie is retained and sent on subsequent XHRs. Verified with curl and end-to-end Playwright.
